item.title:
Arsenal: Arsenal @Arsenal · 1min ”We keep going, keep working hard and sticking together.”
Martin on how we respond following t
item.description:
Arsenal @Arsenal · 1min ”We keep going, keep working hard and sticking together.”
Martin on how we respond following today's result READ | Odegaard: “We have to take the positives” De arsenal.com 46 16 130 1 mil

item.title: nickgoff79: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 3min So much coughing from the knowledgable Crucible crowd tonight that it seems more like watch
item.description: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 3min So much coughing from the knowledgable Crucible crowd tonight that it seems more like watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire 3 226

item.title:
JacobsBen: Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 4min Bayern win the Bundesliga after a 4-2 victory over Stuttgart.
Harry Kane among the scorers
item.description:
Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 4min Bayern win the Bundesliga after a 4-2 victory over Stuttgart.
Harry Kane among the scorers making it 51 goals for the season in all competitions.
Bayern have now won 35 Bundesliga titles. 10 7 134 5 mil

item.title: TikiTakaConnor: Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 5min Arteta has been talking about games being decided in the boxes for years now. Arsenal
item.description:
Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 5min Arteta has been talking about games being decided in the boxes for years now. Arsenal spent a lot of money in the summer. The issues haven’t exactly been resolved.
His negligence in running players into the ground and not giving them adequate rest when the opportunity comes is Mostrar más Cita Connor Humm @TikiTakaConnor · 13min Arteta: “We came here to win the game. I think the message was clear from three days before. We prepared to do that, to take the game to the areas that we believed we could win it. We certainly did that, even though we started the game with a goal down and psychologically we had 8 1 17 3 mil
